facebook.caption: Tourists walk past this place every day on Đường Trần Hưng Đạo. Big mistake. Long Beach Pearl is where you actually shop for Phu Quoc's famous South Sea pearls, not the resort gift shops marking them up 3x. 252 reviews. 4.0 stars. Real selection, real prices. If pearls are on your list, this is the stop. Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
facebook.video_caption: Rows of South Sea pearls at Long Beach Pearl on Đường Trần Hưng Đạo. Resort gift shops charge triple. Skip them. 252 reviews say come here first. Tag your travel buddy.

instagram.caption: Tourists walk past Long Beach Pearl every day. Big mistake. Phu Quoc pearls, real prices, 252 reviews. Save this.
instagram.video_caption: Pearl shopping in Phu Quoc. Skip the resort shops. Long Beach Pearl on Đường Trần Hưng Đạo. 252 reviews back this up.

tiktok.caption: Resort pearl shops are a trap. Locals go to Long Beach Pearl instead. #PhuQuoc #PhuQuocTips #VietnamTravel

video_script.hook: Locals don't shop here. You should.
